_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor growth of neurofibromin-deficient cells is driven by decreased respiration and hampered by NAD

_contextSnippet: When expressing NDI1, Nf1 −/− MEFs increase their OCR and reach the level of Nf1 +/+ cells... tumorigenicity of neurofibromin-deficient cells is decreased by NDI1 in a soft agar assay
details: NDI1 expression increases OCR to reach the level of wild type cells and decreases tumorigenicity in soft agar assay
